reviews.title: The Devil Is Busy
reviews.reviewText: Should win the Oscar but won't because of the political landscape in the US at the amount. Tracii was such an interesting person to follow in this documentary because even though she's religious and feels guilt about her own abortion, it doesn't change the fact that she shows up for these women every day, trying to make them feel safe and maybe protect them from the moral struggles she faces about her own choices. Amazing woman and an amazing short.
reviews.celebrationQuote: Should win the Oscar but won't because of the political landscape in the US at the amount.

reviews.title: Arrival
reviews.reviewText: I know Denis is more well known now for his big effects movies like Dune and Blade Runner, but I think he's at his best in his older movies that make you question your own morals like this and Prisoners

reviews.title: American Beauty
reviews.reviewText: Can't describe how much this film means to me, it's pretty much perfect. All the characters are so relatable in their own ways and I just love them 🌹
